idea-plugin.name: Golden Diff — Figma
idea-plugin.description:
Golden Diff — Figma adds a Figma comparison source to the Golden Diff plugin: it lists the figma-compose-preview @Preview functions in the open file, downloads the referenced Figma frame, and compares it side-by-side with the current screenshot golden — reusing all of Golden Diff's compare modes.

Requires the Golden Diff plugin. Distributed through an internal custom plugin repository, not the Marketplace.
